text:
There once was a little mouse named Mittens. Mittens loved collecting nuts. Every day she scampered around finding treasures. One day she heard something interesting. A big owl had ears as big as a kite!

"Mmm!" thought Mittens. "That must make some good owl food..."

With courage she ventured closer. Suddenly, the big owl swooped down! Mittens scuttled away. Maybe she could outsmart...

"You take that?" said the owl. Mittens didn't know what to say.

"You don't"??

"No?

"You could?"

"...Nothing?"

The owl laughed. Soon he swooped down again. "That's what YOU think!" Suddenly, Mittens heard...

"a tickle"?

The owl hoot-laughed.

"Ha!" laughed Mittens. "That tickles!"

She scampered away. Every day she would listen. They were funny!

One bright day:

"Who's the little mischief-maker?"

Just then... it was Mittens!
